title: woodsia montevidensis
intro: Woodsia montevidensis, also known as the Montevidensis or Mountain Wood Fern, is a species of fern belonging to the genus Woodsia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Woodsia montevidensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically made by drying the fronds and leaves to create a medicinal extract.
